──────────────────────────────────────────

Status:    ⏳ Analysis complete, ready to implement
Impact:    1 fewer workflow, single installer entry point

Risk:      LOW (independent test workflow)

IMMEDIATE (TODAY/TOMORROW):
  1. Review orchestrated-maintenance.yml changes
  2. Test unified task selector locally
  3. Approve Consolidation 1 (maintenance) PR
  4. Discuss: Proceed with consolidations 2-3?

WEEK 1 (AFTER CONSOLIDATION 1 MERGES):
  1. Monitor next scheduled maintenance run (2 AM UTC)
  2. Run manual dispatch tests (all task options)
  3. Verify no regressions on main pipeline
  4. Start Consolidation 2 (installer) implementation

WEEK 2-3 (ROLLING IMPLEMENTATION):
  1. Consolidation 2: enhance installer.yml, test both modes
  2. Consolidation 3: consolidate commit-ready variants
  3. PR → Review → Merge each consolidation
  4. Monitor for stability

WEEK 3-4 (FINAL REVIEW & OPTIONAL PHASE 2b):
  1. Update ORGANIZATION.md with final structure
  2. Decide on Phase 2b extractions (optional)
  3. Document completion + metrics
  4. Celebration! 🎉

================================================================================
                        RISK ASSESSMENT
================================================================================

All consolidations are LOW RISK because:
  ✓ Independent workflows (not blocking main pipeline)
  ✓ Fully testable before pushing
  ✓ Can be reverted in <30 min if needed
  ✓ Scheduled/manual only (not on critical path)
  ✓ Clear testing plan + rollback strategy

Testing Strategy:
  • Unit: YAML validation, job deps, inputs/outputs
  • Integration: Manual dispatch with all options
  • Real-world: Next scheduled run monitoring
  • Regression: Existing behavior unchanged
